note: Manually maintained. Model keys are normalized without date suffixes. When multiple reasoning variants are available, scores average variants from high through the highest setting, for example max.

intelligence.label: Intelligence
intelligence.methodology: Intelligence Index v4.1 combines nine evaluations: GDPval-AA v2, τ³-Banking, Terminal-Bench v2.1, SciCode, Humanity's Last Exam, GPQA Diamond, CritPt, AA-Omniscience, and AA-LCR.
intelligence.reasoningNote: When multiple reasoning variants are available, scores average variants from high through the highest setting, for example max.

codingAgent.label: Coding Agent
codingAgent.source: Artificial Analysis Coding Agent Index v1.1
codingAgent.methodology: Composite average pass@1 across DeepSWE, Terminal-Bench v2, and SWE-Atlas-QnA. Higher is better.
codingAgent.reasoningNote: When multiple reasoning variants are available, scores average variants from high through the highest setting, for example max.
